stamp.title: USA 1c Benjamin Franklin (Series of 1908-1922)
stamp.summary: USA 1c blue Benjamin Franklin postage stamp from the Series of 1908-1922 (Washington-Franklin issues). Design type A140. Appears to be an unused example with a vibrant blue shade. Perforated 12 or 11 (requires measurement).

stamp.title: USA 1c Benjamin Franklin (Series of 1908-1922)
stamp.summary: USA 1c blue Benjamin Franklin postage stamp from the Series of 1908-1922. This example shows a slightly different, more muted blue shade compared to its neighbor. Appears unused.
